Object.name: CadastroTabelaImpostoCbs
Object.description: Tabela Imposto | ICMS, S.T, IPI, PIS, COFINS, INSS

Part.Source: Event Start // Do 'CarregaSitCod' &AnoAtual = year(serverdate()) // Do cAse // CAse &AnoAtual = 2025 // txtAvisoCBS1.Caption = '2025 - CBS Destaque para Teste 0.9 %' // txtAvisoCBS2.Caption = '2025 - IBS UF Destaque para Teste 0.1 %' // txtAvisoCBS3.Caption = '' // // CAse &AnoAtual = 2026 // txtAvisoCBS1.Caption = '2026 - CBS Destaque Obrigatório Regime normal: 0.9 %' // txtAvisoCBS2.Caption = '2026 - IBS UF Destaque Obrigatório Regime normal: 0.1 %' // txtAvisoCBS3.Caption = '2026 - IS Nao Definido.' // // CAse &AnoAtual = 2027 // txtAvisoCBS1.Caption = '2027 - IPI Reduzido a zero PIS e COFINS Extintos' // txtAvisoCBS2.Caption = '2027 - CBS 8.80 % / IBS UF 0.5 % Municipio 0.5 %' // txtAvisoCBS3.Caption = '2027 - IS A Definir.' // // CAse &AnoAtual = 2028 // // CAse &AnoAtual = 2029 // // CAse &AnoAtual = 2030 // // CAse &AnoAtual = 2031 // // CAse &AnoAtual = 2032 // // CAse &AnoAtual = 2033 // // EndCase &IsAtualizar = false txtCarregadoNovo.Caption = '' txtDataHoraCarregado.Caption = '' text.Caption = '' text.ForeColor = RGB(0,100,40) RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWTABELAIMPOSTO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 2, &AutNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &CImpTbFilCod = &parmCImpTbFilCod &CImpLctCod = &parmCImpLctCod &CImpOriUfeCod = &parmCImpOriUfeCod &CImpDstUfeCod = &parmCImpDstUfeCod &CImpGruImpCod = &parmCImpGruImpCod &CImpCatCod = &parmCImpCatCod &CImpDtaIni = &parmCImpDtaIni if &CImpDtaIni.IsEmpty() &CImpDtaIni = serverdate() Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ tbCImpCofinsRed.Width = 60 tbCImpCofins.Width = 60 UnnamedTable15.Width = 20 tbCImpPisRed.Width = 60 tbCImpPis.Width = 60 tbCImpCstPisCofins.Width = 125 tbCImpCstIpi.Width = 150 tbCImpAlqIcmStUF.Width = 82 tbCImpTaxFecop.Width = 82 tbCImpRedAlqIcmExt.Width = 82 &CImpRedAlqIcmExt.TooltipText = "Redução na Base de Cálculo do ICMS S.T." tbCImpAlqMVA.Width = 82 tbCImpAlqIcmExt.Width = 82 &CImpAlqIcmExt.TooltipText = "Alíquota do ICMS S.T (Estado Destino)" PanelIcms.Width = 420 tbCImpAlqIcmUFDest.Width = 87 tbCImpDif.Width = 87 tbCImpRedAlqIcmInt.Width = 87 &CImpRedAlqIcmInt.TooltipText = "Redução na Base de Cálculo do ICMS" tbCImpAlqIcmInt.Width = 87 &CImpAlqIcmInt.TooltipText = "Alíquota do ICMS (Estado Origem)" tbCImpCBenef.Width = 100 UnnamedTable21.Width = 140 UnnamedTable20.Width = 120 UnnamedTable31.Width = 750 UnnamedTable28.Width = 125 UnnamedTable27.Width = 120 UnnamedTable26.Width = 120 UnnamedTable25.Width = 53 UnnamedTable24.Width = 53 UnnamedTable23.Width = 125 UnnamedTable22.Width = 125 Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Grid.Rows = 30 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &IsAtualizar = true do 'LoadImposto' EndEvent Event Grid.Load For &sdtObservacaoNotaItem in &sdtObservacaoNota &gridObsCod = &sdtObservacaoNotaItem.ObsCod &gridObsNom = &sdtObservacaoNotaItem.ObsNom /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &ActionDelete = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ load EndFor EndEvent Event 'DoUserSalvar' &IsErroIpi = false &erroCFOPMensagem = validaCfopTabelaImpostoUfOrigem.UDP(&EmpCod, &CImpTbFilCod, &CImpLctCod, &CImpOriUfeCod, &CImpDstUfeCod, &CImpCfoCod) &Varchar = &CImpCstCod.ToString() &SitCod.FromString(&Varchar) &ErroCSTMensagem = validaSituacaoTributaria.Udp(&EmpCod, &CImpTbFilCod, &SitCod) &Numeric = val(&CImpCstIpi) &Varchar = Substr(&CImpCfoCod, 1, 1) Do Case Case (&CImpAlqIcmInt > &CImpAlqIcmExt and (&CImpAlqMVA = 0 and &CImpRedAlqIcmInt = 0)) and &CImpAlqIcmExt > 0 &erroMensagem = 'Alíq.Interna (ICMS) não pode ser maior que a Alíq.Externa (ICMS S.T)' do 'erro' Case &Varchar in ('5','6','7') and &Numeric < 50 &AuxCImpCstIpi = '99' &MensagemCstIpi = 'PARA CFOPs INICIADOS EM 5,6,7 CST IPI DEVE SER MAIOR/IGUAL QUE 50' Case &Varchar in ('1','2','3') and &Numeric >= 50 &AuxCImpCstIpi = '49' &MensagemCstIpi = 'PARA CFOPs INICIADOS EM 1,2,3 CST IPI DEVE SER MENOR QUE 50' otherwise &AuxCImpCstIpi = &CImpCstIpi Endcase Do Case //Se o CST de IPI for de Imunidade (“04” de Entrada ou “54” de Saída), o Código de Enquadramento deve ser de "001” a “099”; Case &CImpCstIpi in ('04','54') If (&CImpIpiEnq = 0 or &CImpIpiEnq > 99) &erroMensagem = 'Se o CST de IPI for de Imunidade (“04” de Entrada ou “54” de Saída), o Código de Enquadramento deve ser de "001” a “099”' do 'erro' &IsErroIpi = true Endif //Se o CST de IPI for de Suspensão (“05” de Entrada ou “55” de Saída), o Código de Enquadramento deve ser de "101” a “199”; Case &CImpCstIpi in ('05','55') if (&CImpIpiEnq < 101 or &CImpIpiEnq > 199) &erroMensagem = 'Se o CST de IPI for de Suspensão (“05” de Entrada ou “55” de Saída), o Código de Enquadramento deve ser de "101” a “199”;' do 'erro' &IsErroIpi = true Endif //Se o CST de IPI for de Isenção (“02” de Entrada ou “52” de Saída), o Código de Enquadramento deve ser de "301” a “399”; Case &CImpCstIpi in ('02','52') if (&CImpIpiEnq < 301 or &CImpIpiEnq > 399) &erroMensagem = 'Se o CST de IPI for de Isenção (“02” de Entrada ou “52” de Saída), o Código de Enquadramento deve ser de "301” a “399”' do 'erro' &IsErroIpi = true Endif //Se o CST de IPI for de Redução (“49” de Entrada ou “99” de Saída), o Código de Enquadramento deve ser de "601” a “608”; Case &CImpCstIpi in ('49','99') if (&CImpIpiEnq < 601 or &CImpIpiEnq > 608) and &CImpIPI > 0 //SO SE PREENCHEU A ALIQ. &erroMensagem = 'Se o CST de IPI for de Redução (“49” de Entrada ou “99” de Saída), o Código de Enquadramento deve ser de "601” a “608”' do 'erro' &IsErroIpi = true Endif otherwise //E para a tributação normal de IPI ou para “Outros”, o Código de Enquadramento deve ser de "999”. &IsErroIpi = false if &CImpIpiEnq.IsEmpty() &CImpIpiEnq = 999 Endif if &CImpIpiEnq <> 999 &IsErroIpi = true &erroMensagem = 'para a tributação normal de IPI ou para “Outros”, o Código de Enquadramento deve ser de "999”' do 'erro' EndIf EndCAse Do Case Case &IsErroIpi = true &CImpIpiEnq.SetFocus() Case &CImpCstCod = domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST51 and (&CImpRedAlqIcmInt > 0 or &CImpAlqIcmExt > 0 ) //Dar erro ao informar dados de icms st quando sit = 51 &erroMensagem = 'CST 51, não deve possui redução do ICMS e nem % S.T' do 'erro' &CImpCstCod.SetFocus() Case &CImpCstCod = domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST51 and (&CImpDif = 0 ) //Dar erro ao informar dados de icms st quando sit = 51 &erroMensagem = 'CST 51, Não informado o valor do Diferimento para CST Diferido.' do 'erro' &CImpDif.SetFocus() Case not &ErroCSTMensagem.IsEmpty() &erroMensagem = &ErroCSTMensagem do 'erro' case not &erroCFOPMensagem.IsEmpty() &erroMensagem = &erroCFOPMensagem do 'erro' Case &CImpTbFilCod.IsEmpty() &erroMensagem = 'Selecione a Filial!' do 'erro' &CImpTbFilCod.SetFocus() case &CImpLctCod.IsEmpty() &erroMensagem = 'Selecione Tipo de Lançamento!' do 'erro' &CImpLctCod.SetFocus() Case &CImpOriUfeCod.IsEmpty() &erroMensagem = 'Selecione a UF de Origem!' do 'erro' &CImpOriUfeCod.SetFocus() Case &CImpDstUfeCod.IsEmpty() &erroMensagem = 'Selecione a UF de Destino!' do 'erro' &CImpDstUfeCod.SetFocus() Case &CImpGruImpCod.IsEmpty() &erroMensagem = 'Selecione o Grupo de Impostos do Cliente!' do 'erro' &CImpGruImpCod.SetFocus() Case &CImpCatCod.IsEmpty() &erroMensagem = 'Selecione a Categoria de Imposto do Produto!' do 'erro' &CImpCatCod.SetFocus() Case &CImpCfoCod.IsEmpty() &erroMensagem = 'Selecione a CFOP!' do 'erro' &CImpCfoCod.SetFocus() Case &CImpALqIcmUFDest > 0 and (&CImpALqIcmUFDest < &CImpAlqIcmInt or &CImpAlqIcmInt.IsEmpty()) &erroMensagem = 'Valor do (DIFAL)%.UF.Dest., deve ser aliquota do icms + o difal, não pode se menor que a aliquota do icms!' do 'erro' &CImpALqIcmUFDest.SetFocus() Case (&CImpClsCST.IsEmpty() and not &CImpClsTrib.IsEmpty()) or (&CImpClsTrib.IsEmpty() and not &CImpClsCST.IsEmpty()) &erroMensagem = 'Caso informado o CST deve ser informado cClassTrib e vice-versa!' do 'erro' //case &OriTriCod.IsEmpty() //msg('Selecione a Origem Tributária!') //&OriCod.SetFocus() //Case &SitCod.IsEmpty() //msg('Selecione a Situação Tributária!') //&SitCod.SetFocus() Case &AuxCImpCstIpi <> &CImpCstIpi &erroMensagem = &MensagemCstIpi do 'erro' &CImpCstIpi.SetFocus() // Case &CltSitCod.IsEmpty() // &erroMensagem = 'CST [Situação tributária IBS/CBS não informada]' // do 'erro' // Case &CltClsTrib.IsEmpty() // &erroMensagem = 'ClassTrib [Classificação Tributária não selecionada]' // do 'erro' Otherwise &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs = new() &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.EmpCod = &EmpCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpTbFilCod = &CImpTbFilCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpLctCod = &CImpLctCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpOriUfeCod = &CImpOriUfeCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDstUfeCod = &CImpDstUfeCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpGruImpCod = &CImpGruImpCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCatCod = &CImpCatCod if &CImpDtaIni < serverdate() &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDtaIni = serverdate() Else &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDtaIni = &CImpDtaIni Endif &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCfoCod = &CImpCfoCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCstCod = &CImpCstCod &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpObsInf = &CImpObsInf &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDtaAlt = serverNow() //// Do CAse //// CAse &CImpCstCod = domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST00 //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqMVA = &CImpAlqMVA //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmInt = &CImpAlqIcmInt //// //&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpRedAlqIcmInt = &CImpRedAlqIcmInt //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmExt = &CImpAlqIcmExt //// //&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpRedAlqIcmExt = &CImpRedAlqIcmExt //// //&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDif = &CImpDif //// //&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCBenef = &CImpCBenef //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmUFDest = &CImpAlqIcmUFDest //// //&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIcmsMotDes = &CImpIcmsMotDes //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpTaxFecop = &CImpTaxFecop //// //&sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIcmsRet = &CImpIcmsRet //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmStUF = &CImpAlqIcmStUF //// //// CAse &CImpCstCod = domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST02 //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqMVA = &CImpAlqMVA //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmInt = &CImpAlqIcmInt //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpRedAlqIcmInt = &CImpRedAlqIcmInt //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmExt = &CImpAlqIcmExt //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpRedAlqIcmExt = &CImpRedAlqIcmExt //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDif = &CImpDif //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCBenef = &CImpCBenef //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmUFDest = &CImpAlqIcmUFDest //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIcmsMotDes = &CImpIcmsMotDes //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpTaxFecop = &CImpTaxFecop //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIcmsRet = &CImpIcmsRet //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmStUF = &CImpAlqIcmStUF //// //// CAse &CImpCstCod = domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST10 //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqMVA = &CImpAlqMVA //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmInt = &CImpAlqIcmInt //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpRedAlqIcmInt = &CImpRedAlqIcmInt //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmExt = &CImpAlqIcmExt //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpRedAlqIcmExt = &CImpRedAlqIcmExt //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDif = &CImpDif //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCBenef = &CImpCBenef //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmUFDest = &CImpAlqIcmUFDest //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIcmsMotDes = &CImpIcmsMotDes //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpTaxFecop = &CImpTaxFecop //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIcmsRet = &CImpIcmsRet //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmStUF = &CImpAlqIcmStUF //// //// CAse &CImpCstCod = domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST15 //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqMVA = &CImpAlqMVA //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmInt = &CImpAlqIcmInt //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpRedAlqIcmInt = &CImpRedAlqIcmInt //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmExt = &CImpAlqIcmExt //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpRedAlqIcmExt = &CImpRedAlqIcmExt //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDif = &CImpDif //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCBenef = &CImpCBenef //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmUFDest = &CImpAlqIcmUFDest //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIcmsMotDes = &CImpIcmsMotDes //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpTaxFecop = &CImpTaxFecop //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIcmsRet = &CImpIcmsRet //// &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmStUF = &CImpAlqIcmStUF //// Otherwise &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqMVA = &CImpAlqMVA &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmInt = &CImpAlqIcmInt &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpRedAlqIcmInt = &CImpRedAlqIcmInt &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmExt = &CImpAlqIcmExt &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpRedAlqIcmExt = &CImpRedAlqIcmExt &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpDif = &CImpDif &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCBenef = &CImpCBenef &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmUFDest = &CImpAlqIcmUFDest &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIcmsMotDes = &CImpIcmsMotDes &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpTaxFecop = &CImpTaxFecop &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIcmsRet = &CImpIcmsRet &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqIcmStUF = &CImpAlqIcmStUF &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpClsCST = &CImpClsCST &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpClsTrib = &CImpClsTrib //// EndCAse //INCLUIR E EXCLUIR &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIncIPI = &CImpIncIPI &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpExcPisCofins = &CImpExcPisCofins //IPI &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCstIpi = &CImpCstIpi &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIpi = &CImpIpi &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpIpiEnq = &CImpIpiEnq //INSS &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpAlqInss = &CImpAlqInss //PIS e COFINS &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCstPisCofins = &CImpCstPisCofins &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCofins = &CImpCofins &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpCofinsRed = &CImpCofinsRed &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpPis = &CImpPis &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CImpPisRed = &CImpPisRed //IBS CBS // &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CltSitCod = &CltSitCod // &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs.CltClsTrib = &CltClsTrib prcGravaNovaConfiguracaoImposto.Call('ADD', &sdtCadastroTabelaImpostoCbs, &sdtObservacaoNota) &DataHora = ServerNow() text.Caption = 'Configurações salvas com sucesso! ' + trim(toformattedString(&DataHora)) text.ForeColor = RGB(0,150,50) EndCAse /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoUserCancel' return // wwpActions.WCPopup_Close('') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Enter &ObsNom = '' For Each Order EmpCod, ObsCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ObsCod = &ObsCod &IsAchou = false For &sdtObservacaoNotaItem in &sdtObservacaoNota If &sdtObservacaoNotaItem.ObsCod = &ObsCod &IsAchou = true Exit EndIf EndFor if &IsAchou = false &sdtObservacaoNotaItem = new() &sdtObservacaoNotaItem.ObsCod = ObsCod &sdtObservacaoNotaItem.ObsNom = ObsNom &sdtObservacaoNota.Add(&sdtObservacaoNotaItem) EndIF When none &ObsNom = 'OBSERVACAO NAO LOCALIZADA!' &erroMensagem = 'Observação não Localizada!' do 'erro' EndFor grid.Refresh() &ObsCod.setfocus() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //Code block: LoadWWPContext LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoUserCarregar' do 'LoadImposto' grid.Refresh() EndEvent Event &CImpDstUfeCod.ControlValueChanged do 'LoadImposto' grid.Refresh() EndEvent Event &CImpOriUfeCod.ControlValueChanged do 'LoadImposto' grid.Refresh() EndEvent Event &CImpLctCod.ControlValueChanged do 'LoadImposto' grid.Refresh() EndEvent Event &CImpTbFilCod.ControlValueChanged RetornaRegimeTributarioFilial.Call(&EmpCod, &CImpTbFilCod, &FilRegTrib, &CImpOriUfeCod) do 'LoadImposto' grid.Refresh() EndEvent Event &CImpGruImpCod.ControlValueChanged do 'LoadImposto' grid.Refresh() EndEvent Event &CImpCatCod.ControlValueChanged Do 'LoadImposto' grid.Refresh() EndEvent Event &CImpDtaIni.ControlValueChanged Do 'LoadImposto' grid.Refresh() EndEvent Event &ObsCod.IsValid do 'getObservacao' EndEvent Event &ActionDelete.Click For &sdtObservacaoNotaItem in &sdtObservacaoNota If &sdtObservacaoNotaItem.ObsCod = &gridObsCod &index = &sdtObservacaoNota.IndexOf(&sdtObservacaoNotaItem) &sdtObservacaoNota.Remove(&index) EndiF EndFor grid.Refresh() &ObsCod.SetFocus() EndEvent Event &CImpCstIpi.ControlValueChanged do 'CSTVISIBLE' EndEvent Event &CImpCstCod.ControlValueChanged do 'CSTVISIBLE' EndEvent Event &CImpCstPisCofins.ControlValueChanged do 'CSTVISIBLE' EndEvent Sub 'getObservacao' &ObsNom = '' For Each Order EmpCod, ObsCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ObsCod = &ObsCod &ObsNom = ObsNom Exit When none &ObsNom = 'OBSERVACAO NAO LOCALIZADA!' EndFor EndSub Sub 'erro' // msg(&erroMensagem) text.Caption = &erroMensagem text.ForeColor = RGB(230,20,30) EndSub Sub 'LoadImposto' txtCarregadoNovo.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) Do CAse CAse &CImpTbFilCod.IsEmpty() txtCarregadoNovo.Caption = 'Informe a Grupo Filial' case &CImpLctCod.IsEmpty() txtCarregadoNovo.Caption = 'Informe Tipo Lançamento' CAse &CImpOriUfeCod.IsEmpty() txtCarregadoNovo.Caption = 'Informe UF Origem' Case &CImpDstUfeCod.IsEmpty() txtCarregadoNovo.Caption = 'Informe UF Destino' Case &CImpGruImpCod.IsEmpty() txtCarregadoNovo.Caption = 'Informe Grupo Pessoas' Case &CImpCatCod.IsEmpty() txtCarregadoNovo.Caption = 'Informe Grupo Produtos' Case &CImpDtaIni.IsEmpty() txtCarregadoNovo.Caption = 'Informe Data Inicial' otherwise For Each Order (IbsCbsDta) Where IbsCbsDta <= &CImpDtaIni &IbsUnTax = IbsUnTax &IbsUfTax = IbsUfTax &IbsMunTax = IbsMunTax Exit EndFor // For Each Order EmpCod, TbImpFilCod // Where EmpCod = &EmpCod // Where TbImpFilCod = &ImpFilCod // // &TbFilRegTrib = TbFilRegTrib // Exit // EndFor // For Each Order EmpCod,CImpTbFilCod,CImpLctCod,CImpOriUfeCod,CImpDstUfeCod,CImpGruImpCod,CImpCatCod,(CImpDtaIni) Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CImpTbFilCod = &CImpTbFilCod Where CImpLctCod = &CImpLctCod Where CImpOriUfeCod = &CImpOriUfeCod Where CImpDstUfeCod = &CImpDstUfeCod Where CImpGruImpCod = &CImpGruImpCod Where CImpCatCod = &CImpCatCod Where CImpDtaIni <= &CImpDtaIni &CImpCfoCod = CImpCfoCod &CImpAlqMVA = CImpAlqMVA &CImpAlqIcmInt = CImpAlqIcmInt &CImpRedAlqIcmInt = CImpRedAlqIcmInt &CImpAlqIcmExt = CImpAlqIcmExt &CImpRedAlqIcmExt = CImpRedAlqIcmExt &CImpDif = CImpDif &CImpCofins = CImpCofins &CImpCofinsRed = CImpCofinsRed &CImpPis = CImpPis &CImpPisRed = CImpPisRed &CImpIpi = CImpIpi &CImpCstPisCofins = CImpCstPisCofins &CImpCstCod = CImpCstCod &CImpCstIpi = CImpCstIpi &CImpCBenef = CImpCBenef &CImpAlqIcmUFDest = CImpAlqIcmUFDest &CImpIcmsMotDes = CImpIcmsMotDes &CImpTaxFecop = CImpTaxFecop &CImpIcmsRet = CImpIcmsRet &CImpObsInf = CImpObsInf &CImpAlqIcmStUF = CImpAlqIcmStUF &CImpIncIPI = CImpIncIPI &CImpExcPisCofins = CImpExcPisCofins &CImpIpiEnq = CImpIpiEnq &CImpAlqInss = CImpAlqInss &CImpDtaAlt = CImpDtaAlt &CImpClsCST = CImpClsCST &CImpClsTrib = CImpClsTrib //IBS CBS // &CltSitCod = CltSitCod // &CltClsTrib = CltClsTrib // do 'CarregaClssTrib' // &CltClsTrib = CltClsTrib // do 'LoadClassificacaotributaria' //Observacoes da tabela &sdtObservacaoNota.Clear() for Each Order EmpCod,CImpTbFilCod,CImpLctCod,CImpOriUfeCod,CImpDstUfeCod,CImpGruImpCod,CImpCatCod,CImpDtaIni, ObsCod &sdtObservacaoNotaItem = new() &sdtObservacaoNotaItem.ObsCod = ObsCod &sdtObservacaoNotaItem.ObsNom = ObsNom &sdtObservacaoNota.Add(&sdtObservacaoNotaItem) EndFor &Mensagem = '' txtCarregadoNovo.Caption = 'Carregado: ' +trim(toformattedString(CImpDtaIni)) if &CImpDtaIni > CImpDtaIni txtCarregadoNovo.ForeColor = RGB(200,100,0) Else txtCarregadoNovo.ForeColor = RGB(0,100,200) Endif &CarregadoCImpDtaIni = CImpDtaIni //JDF CARREGOU ULTIMA CONFIGURACAO Exit When none txtCarregadoNovo.Caption = 'NOVA CONFIGURAÇÃO' txtCarregadoNovo.ForeColor = RGB(0,150,50) // if &TbFilRegTrib = RegimeTributario.SimplesNacional // &ImpCstCofins = NF_CstCofins.COF99 // &ImpCstPis = NF_CstPIS.CST99 // &ImpCstIpi = '99' // &ImpIcmsMotDes = '' // Else // RegimeNormal1.Visible = 1 // Endif EndFor // // if &TbFilRegTrib <> RegimeTributario.SimplesNacional // RegimeNormal1.Visible = 1 // Endif // &R = round(Random()*100,3) &G = round(Random()*100,3) &B = round(Random()*100,3) &DataHora = serverNow() txtDataHoraCarregado.Caption= 'Consultado: '+trim(toformattedString(&DataHora)) txtDataHoraCarregado.ForeColor = RGB(&R,&G,&B) do 'CSTVISIBLE' EndCase text.Caption = '' EndSub Sub 'CSTVISIBLE' //// //ipi //// tbCImpIpi.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpIpiEnq.Visible = 0 //// //// //configu //// tbModoCalculo.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpIncIPI.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpExcPisCofins.Visible = 0 //// //// //pis cofins //// tbCImpCofins.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpCofinsRed.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpPis.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpPisRed.Visible = 1 //// //// tbIcmsSt.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpAlqMVA.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpAlqIcmInt.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpRedAlqIcmInt.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpAlqIcmExt.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpRedAlqIcmExt.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpDif.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpCBenef.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpAlqIcmUFDest.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpIcmsMotDes.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpTaxFecop.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpIcmsRet.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpAlqIcmStUF.Visible = 0 //// //// Do CAse //// CAse &CImpCstCod = domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST00 //// tbCImpAlqIcmInt.Visible = 1 //// //// CAse &CImpCstCod = domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST02 //// //qBCMono //JDF geraXml nao preparado para o CST //// //adRemICMS //// //vICMSMono //// //// CAse &CImpCstCod = domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST10 //// tbCImpAlqIcmInt.Visible = 1 //// tbIcmsSt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpAlqIcmExt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpRedAlqIcmInt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpAlqMVA.Visible = 1 //// //// CAse &CImpCstCod = domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST15 //// //JDF geraXml nao preparado para o CST //// //// CAse &CImpCstCod = domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST20 //// tbCImpCBenef.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpRedAlqIcmInt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpAlqIcmInt.Visible = 1 //// //// CAse &CImpCstCod = domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST30 //// tbCImpCBenef.Visible = 1 //// tbIcmsSt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpAlqMVA.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpRedAlqIcmExt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpAlqIcmExt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpAlqIcmInt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpIcmsMotDes.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpTaxFecop.Visible = 1 //// //// CAse &CImpCstCod = domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST40 //// tbCImpCBenef.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpAlqIcmInt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpIcmsMotDes.Visible = 1 //// //// CAse &CImpCstCod = domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST41 //// tbCImpCBenef.Visible = 1 //// //// tbCImpAlqIcmInt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpIcmsMotDes.Visible = 1 //// //// CAse &CImpCstCod = domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST50 //// tbCImpCBenef.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpAlqIcmInt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpIcmsMotDes.Visible = 1 //// //// CAse &CImpCstCod = domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST51 //// tbCImpCBenef.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpRedAlqIcmInt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpAlqIcmInt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpDif.Visible = 1 //// //// CAse &CImpCstCod = domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST53 //// //tbCImpCBenef.Visible = 1 //JDF geraXml nao preparado para o CST //// //// CAse &CImpCstCod = domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST60 //// tbCImpIcmsRet.Visible = 1 //// //JDF geraXml nao preparado para o CST //// //&det.imposto.icms.ICMSST. = trim(&pSTRetido) //>>FALTA PREENCHER ESTE CAMPO //// //&det.imposto.icms.ICMSST.vBCSTRet = trim(&vBSTRetido) //>>>>>> FALTA PREENCHER ESTE CAMPO //// //&det.imposto.icms.ICMSST.vICMSSTRet = trim(&vSTRetido) //>>>>>> FALTA PREENCHER ESTE CAMPO //// //&det.imposto.icms.ICMSST.vBCSTDest = trim(&vBSTRetido) //>>>>>> FALTA PREENCHER ESTE CAMPO //// //&det.imposto.icms.ICMSST.vICMSSTDest= trim(&vSTRetido) //>>>>>> FALTA PREENCHER ESTE CAMPO //// //// CAse &CImpCstCod = domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST61 //// //// //&det.imposto.ICMS.ICMS61.qBCMonoRet = trim(&vBSTRetido) //// //&det.imposto.ICMS.ICMS61.adRemICMSRet = trim(&pSTRetido) //// //&det.imposto.ICMS.ICMS61.vICMSMonoRet = trim(&vSTRetido) //// //// CAse &CImpCstCod = domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST70 //// tbCImpCBenef.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpRedAlqIcmInt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpAlqIcmInt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpAlqMVA.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpRedAlqIcmExt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpAlqIcmExt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpIcmsMotDes.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpTaxFecop.Visible = 1 //// //// CAse &CImpCstCod = domSituacaoTributariaVarchar.CST90 //// tbIcmsSt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpAlqMVA.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpAlqIcmInt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpRedAlqIcmInt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpAlqIcmExt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpRedAlqIcmExt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpDif.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpCBenef.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpAlqIcmUFDest.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpIcmsMotDes.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpTaxFecop.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpIcmsRet.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpAlqIcmStUF.Visible = 1 //// //// Otherwise //// //ipi //// tbIpi.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpIpi.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpIpiEnq.Visible = 1 //// //// //configu //// tbModoCalculo.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpIncIPI.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpExcPisCofins.Visible = 1 //// //// //pis cofins //// tbCImpCofins.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpCofinsRed.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpPis.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpPisRed.Visible = 1 //// //// tbIcmsSt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpAlqMVA.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpAlqIcmInt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpRedAlqIcmInt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpAlqIcmExt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpRedAlqIcmExt.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpDif.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpCBenef.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpAlqIcmUFDest.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpIcmsMotDes.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpTaxFecop.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpIcmsRet.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpAlqIcmStUF.Visible = 1 //// EndCAse //// //// tbCImpIpi.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpIpiEnq.Visible = 0 //// Do Case //// Case &CImpCstIpi = '00' //0 Entrada com Recuperação de Crédito //// tbCImpIpi.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpIpiEnq.Visible = 1 //// Case &CImpCstIpi = '01' //1 Entrada Tributável com Alíquota Zero //// tbCImpIpi.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpIpiEnq.Visible = 0 //// Case &CImpCstIpi = '02' //2 Entrada Isenta //// tbCImpIpi.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpIpiEnq.Visible = 1 //// Case &CImpCstIpi = '03' //3 Entrada Não-Tributada //// tbCImpIpi.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpIpiEnq.Visible = 0 //// Case &CImpCstIpi = '04' //4 Entrada Imune //// tbCImpIpi.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpIpiEnq.Visible = 1 //// Case &CImpCstIpi = '05' //5 Entrada com Suspensão //// tbCImpIpi.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpIpiEnq.Visible = 1 //// Case &CImpCstIpi = '49' //49 Outras Entradas //// tbCImpIpi.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpIpiEnq.Visible = 1 //// Case &CImpCstIpi = '50' //50 Saída Tributada //// tbCImpIpi.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpIpiEnq.Visible = 1 //// Case &CImpCstIpi = '51' //51 Saída Tributável com Alíquota Zero //// tbCImpIpi.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpIpiEnq.Visible = 0 //// Case &CImpCstIpi = '52' //52 Saída Isenta //// tbCImpIpi.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpIpiEnq.Visible = 1 //// Case &CImpCstIpi = '53' //53 Saída Não-Tributada //// tbCImpIpi.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpIpiEnq.Visible = 0 //// Case &CImpCstIpi = '54' //54 Saída Imune //// tbCImpIpi.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpIpiEnq.Visible = 1 //// Case &CImpCstIpi = '55' //55 Saída com Suspensão //// tbCImpIpi.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpIpiEnq.Visible = 1 //// Case &CImpCstIpi = '99' //99 Outras Saídas' //// tbCImpIpi.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpIpiEnq.Visible = 1 //// EndCase //// //// //pis cofins //// Do CAse //// CAse &CImpCstPisCofins = NF_CstPIS.CST01 //// tbCImpPisRed.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpCofins.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpCofinsRed.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpPis.Visible = 1 //// //// CAse &CImpCstPisCofins = NF_CstPIS.CST02 //// tbCImpPisRed.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpCofins.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpCofinsRed.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpPis.Visible = 1 //// //// CAse &CImpCstPisCofins = NF_CstPIS.CST03 //// tbCImpPisRed.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpCofins.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpCofinsRed.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpPis.Visible = 1 //// //// CAse &CImpCstPisCofins = NF_CstPIS.CST04 or &CImpCstPisCofins = NF_CstPIS.CST06 or &CImpCstPisCofins = NF_CstPIS.CST07 or &CImpCstPisCofins = NF_CstPIS.CST08 or &CImpCstPisCofins = NF_CstPIS.CST09 //// tbCImpPisRed.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpCofins.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpCofinsRed.Visible = 0 //// tbCImpPis.Visible = 0 //// Otherwise //// tbCImpPisRed.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpCofins.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpCofinsRed.Visible = 1 //// tbCImpPis.Visible = 1 //// EndCase EndSub //Event &CltSitCod.ControlValueChanged // // do 'CarregaClssTrib' // //EndEvent //Event &CltClsTrib.controlValueChanged // // do 'LoadClassificacaotributaria' // //EndEvent //Sub 'CarregaSitCod' // // &CltSitCod.clear() // &CltSitCod.AddItem('', 'SITUAÇÃO TRIBUTÁRIA (CST) NÃO SELECIONADO') // For Each Order CltSitCod // &AuxMensagem = Format('%1 - %2', CltSitCod.Trim(), CltSitNom.trim()) // &CltSitCod.AddItem(CltSitCod, &AuxMensagem) // EndFor // //EndSub //Sub 'CarregaClssTrib' // // &CltClsTrib.Clear() // &CltClsTrib.AddItem('', 'CLASSIFICAÇÃO TRIBUTÁRIA (cClassTrib) NÃO SELECIONADO') // For Each Order CltSitCod, CltClsTrib // Where CltSitCod = &CltSitCod // if (CltClsDtaFim < Serverdate() and not CltClsDtaFim.IsEmpty() and not CltClsDtaFim.IsNull()) or CltClsDtaIni > serverdate() // &AuxMensagem = Format('[REMOVIDO] %1 - %2', CltClsTrib.Trim(), CltClsNomRed.trim()) // Else // &AuxMensagem = Format('%1 - %2', CltClsTrib.Trim(), CltClsNomRed.trim()) // Endif // // &CltClsTrib.AddItem(CltClsTrib, &AuxMensagem) // When none // &CltClsTrib.AddItem('', 'CST SEM Classificação Tributária (cClassTrib) NÃO SELECIONADO') // EndFor // //EndSub //Sub 'LoadClassificacaotributaria' // // &CltClsIsNfce = false // &CltClsIsNfe = false // &CltClsIsNfse = false // &CltClsIsCte = false // &CltClsIsCteOs = false // &CltClsIsExtCred.SetEmpty() // &CltClsIsPre.SetEmpty() // &CltClsIsRedBas.SetEmpty() // &CltClsIsTribReg.SetEmpty() // &CltClsTipAliq.SetEmpty() // &CltClsDtaFim.SetEmpty() // &CltClsDtaIni.SetEmpty() // &CltClsRedIbs.SetEmpty() // &CltClsRedCbs.SetEmpty() // For Each Order CltSitCod, CltClsTrib // Where CltSitCod = &CltSitCod // Where CltClsTrib = &CltClsTrib // &CltClsIsNfce = CltClsIsNfce // &CltClsIsNfe = CltClsIsNfe // &CltClsIsNfse = CltClsIsNfse // &CltClsIsCte = CltClsIsCte // &CltClsIsCteOs = CltClsIsCteOs // &CltClsIsExtCred = CltClsIsExtCred // &CltClsIsPre = CltClsIsPre // &CltClsIsRedBas = CltClsIsRedBas // &CltClsIsTribReg = CltClsIsTribReg // &CltClsTipAliq = CltClsTipAliq // &CltClsDtaFim = CltClsDtaFim // &CltClsDtaIni = CltClsDtaIni // &CltClsRedIbs = CltClsRedIbs // &CltClsRedCbs = CltClsRedCbs // // Exit // EndFor // //EndSub //Event &ImpCfoCod.IsValid // // &erroCFOPMensagem = validaCfopTabelaImposto.UDP(&EmpCod, &ImpFilCod, &ImpLctCod, &ImpUfeCod, &ImpCfoCod) // if not &erroCFOPMensagem.IsEmpty() // msg(&erroCFOPMensagem) // Endif // //EndEvent // //Event &SitCod.IsValid // // &ErroCSTMensagem = validaSituacaoTributaria.Udp(&EmpCod, &ImpFilCod, &SitCod) // if not &ErroCSTMensagem.IsEmpty() // msg(&ErroCSTMensagem) // EndiF // //EndEvent // //Sub 'LimpaCampos' // // &ImpAlqMVA.SetEmpty() // &ImpAlqIcmInt.SetEmpty() // &ImpRedAlqIcmInt.SetEmpty() // &ImpAlqIcmExt.SetEmpty() // &ImpRedAlqIcmExt.SetEmpty() // &ImpDif.SetEmpty() // &ImpCofins.SetEmpty() // &ImpPis.SetEmpty() // &ImpIPI.SetEmpty() // &ImpIcmsRet.SetEmpty() // &SitCod.SetEmpty() // &ImpCBenef.SetEmpty() // &ImpFilCod.SetFocus() // //EndSub

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Exluir ICMS Base de Calculo PIS/COFINS

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Incluir IPI na Base de Calculo

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Tabela Imposto | ICMS, S.T, IPI, PIS, COFINS, INSS
